insights.title: The Compute Disparity
insights.fact: Europe hosts just 5% of global frontier AI compute.
insights.detail: This creates a structural strategic weakness against US hyperscalers.

insights.title: The Capital Density Problem
insights.fact: Startups struggle against the scale of Silicon Valley capital.
insights.detail: The UK needs stronger anchor demand and state-backed procurement.
Compute concentration creates strategic leverage for great powers.

timeline.briefing: Hyperscalers pressure the UK to accept foreign compute terms.
timeline.defaultPath: The UK must decide whether to build sovereign public clusters or accept foreign dependency.

options.label: Accept hyperscaler terms
options.summary: Rapid compute growth, high short-term economic gain.
options.log: Accepted hyperscaler terms, increasing compute but weakening sovereignty.

options.label: Launch sovereign grid initiative
options.log: Launched sovereign grid initiative and public compute clusters.

timeline.briefing: The public sector must decide whether to buy domestic or foreign AI systems.
timeline.defaultPath: Public procurement can either strengthen UK startups or destroy them.

options.label: Default to US enterprise APIs
options.log: Procured US APIs for public services.

options.label: Mandate UK anchor procurement
options.log: Passed anchor procurement rules for UK builders.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Sovereign Tech-Fortress
outcomeArchetypes.desc: The UK secures strong autonomy and public compute infrastructure.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Middle-Power Broker
outcomeArchetypes.desc: The UK becomes a strategic broker among allied states.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Anglo-American Protectorate
outcomeArchetypes.desc: The UK remains heavily dependent on foreign systems.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Hyper-Capital Gilded Island
outcomeArchetypes.desc: Economic growth rises while social cohesion weakens.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Sidelined Hermit Kingdom
outcomeArchetypes.desc: The UK falls behind in both compute and innovation.

outcomeArchetypes.title: The Pragmatic Compromise State
outcomeArchetypes.desc: The UK survives through compromise and incremental change.
